text:
I'd love to tell you about Sally the sloth...*

*(Quickly)*

*Sally liked to sleep in a tall tree branch halfway down a forest trail. Every once in a while, she'd wake up singing a cheerful little song about pandas eating bamboo. Her favorite song was about flying squirrels learning to surf. Yes, that Sally.*

*Sally was a slow-moving critter compared to most creatures. She preferred peaceful pursuits like reading books about dinosaurs even though they were long gone. During the last petting zoo she visited, she got a sticker on her book that said, "Fastest Slowpoke on Five Legs."*

*Sally spent her days munching on leaves and contemplating the universe. Maybe next time she'd figure out how to read the stickies.* You could always find her hanging out with her favorite book club of wise old owls. Maybe someday she'd learn how to turn pages...*

*(She opens a book)* Ah... It says here that owls
